allow: Bash(node -e "const g6 = require\('@antv/g6'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(g6\).filter\(k => typeof g6[k] === 'function' || typeof g6[k] === 'object'\).slice\(0, 30\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const g6 = require\('@antv/g6'\); console.log\('Graph:', typeof g6.Graph\); console.log\('register:', typeof g6.register\); console.log\(Object.keys\(g6\).filter\(k => k.includes\('register'\) || k.includes\('Register'\)\)\)")
